name: Sean Lock
bio: Sean Lock was an English comedian and actor known for surreal, deadpan stand-up and his long-running role as a team captain on the Channel 4 panel shows 8 Out of 10 Cats and 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown. He won the British Comedy Award for Best Live Comic in 2000 and was repeatedly ranked among Britains greatest stand-ups. He died of cancer in 2021.

timeline.ev: Wins the British Comedy Award for Best Live Comic
Becomes a team captain on Channel 4s 8 Out of 10 Cats
Voted 55th-greatest stand-up on Channel 4s 100 Greatest Stand-Ups
Joins 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

accolades: British Comedy Award for Best Live Comic (2000)

bits.t: Sean Lock in a Riddler Costume
